Title: Cute Astronaut Cat Sticker Line Art - Space Theme Sticker Design
Description:
Celebrate the cosmic journey with this charming astronaut cat design sticker. This simple yet adorable line art sticker features a cute cat wearing a futuristic astronaut helmet, surrounded by planets and celestial stars.

Perfect for adding a touch of whimsical space magic to various surfaces. Ideal for:

  • Decorating notebooks and journals
  • Personalizing water bottles and laptops
  • Creating festive gift tags or scrapbook elements
  • Displaying themed party decor

The clean, minimalist black outline style ensures it looks stylish and cute wherever you apply it. It makes a thoughtful gift for cat lovers, space enthusiasts, and anyone who appreciates cute, cosmic designs.

Material & Quality: Printed on durable, high-quality sticker paper, offering excellent adhesion and vibrant details. Resistant to fading and water-safe for long-lasting enjoyment.
